alert.claim: Adidas now conflicts with the client's zero-tolerance labour-governance mandate

nodes.label: Mandate: clean labour, no hypocrisy risk
nodes.quote: If my name is linked via my portfolio to ... sweatshops, illegal exploitation, or wage theft, it creates immediate hypocrisy risk for my own stores.

nodes.label: Instruction: dump on labour allegations
nodes.quote: If any ... brand we hold gets hit with severe labor exploitation allegations, dump the entire position before the local Swiss press can link my name to it.

nodes.label: Propose: SELL Adidas → BUY a CIO-BUY Consumer Discretionary name with clean governance

alert.claim: Possible labour-governance concern on Adidas — weaker case after RM challenge

nodes.label: Mandate: clean labour, no hypocrisy risk
nodes.quote: If my name is linked via my portfolio to ... sweatshops, illegal exploitation, or wage theft, it creates immediate hypocrisy risk for my own stores.

nodes.label: (challenged by RM — excluded)
nodes.quote: If any ... brand we hold gets hit with severe labor exploitation allegations, dump the entire position before the local Swiss press can link my name to it.

nodes.label: Hold & monitor — flag for RM review, no divestment recommended
